public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as cache keeper.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a cache keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of cache keeper in and around Scarlet Depths, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Scarlet Depths workable through the obligations of cache keeper while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Scarlet Depths, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of cache keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ashra Glassmelt needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Scarlet Depths.
Working with Ashra Glassmelt can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Scarlet Depths.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Ashra Glassmelt visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Scarlet Depths: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
